chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P No. 4607 of 2025 (Siddiq Ullah V. Federation of Pakistan & Others) Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza Petitioner: Siddiq Ullah, Through Mr. Jawad Mustafa, Advocate. Respondents Federation of Pakistan & Others, No. 1 to 4 & 6: Through Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rjpar, Advocate. Date of hearing: 06.11.2025 Date of Order: 06.11.2025. O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J. - Mr. Khalid Rajpar files copy of show- cause notice recently issued to the petitioner. Since show cause notice has now been issued, the contention of the petitioner that no contravention report has been prepared after seizure of goods, remains no more. The purpose of filing the petition stands served. Therefore, petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
